hook.text: UNITED IN FORMAL TALKS FOR FERNANDES

beats.text: WEST HAM VALUE THE MIDFIELDER AT £80M
ROMANO CONFIRMS UNITED ARE IN THE RACE
PSG LURK BUT FERNANDES PREFERS UNITED

caption: United have opened formal talks for Mateus Fernandes — West Ham want £80m for the Portuguese star. Do we pay up? 🔴 Per Romano / Ben Jacobs.
